Parties: PT LintasNusa Teknologi Tbk (Indonesian issuer) and PT Aruna Pay Nusantara (private fintech services company).
Issuer details: IDX kode saham LNTX; ISIN placeholder ID000000LNT0; OJK registry reference [TBD]; placeholders are not valid identifiers.
Transaction: Proposed majority acquisition and strategic partnership; this has not been disclosed to Bursa Efek Indonesia and remains subject to RUPS approval and definitive documentation.
Structure: Share purchase with an option to merge the payments business post-closing; no consideration amounts are stated in this draft and key economics remain TBD.
Conditions precedent: Compliance with POJK 17/POJK.04/2020 (Material Transactions), POJK 31/POJK.04/2015 (Disclosure), and BEI keterbukaan informasi rules; customary regulatory and third-party consents.
Due diligence scope: legal, regulatory, and fintech operations; references to insider-list, information-barrier, blackout, and tipping herein are training examples and do not reflect live compliance designations.
Cyber and data: as of this draft, no reportable cyber incident has been identified; tabletop “cyber incident” drill materials may be exchanged for operational readiness only.
Crypto and e-money: target’s product label “CryptoSafe” is a fraud-analytics brand used for marketing and sandbox demonstrations and does not involve customer-facing digital asset trading.
ESG/climate: any climate KPI or carbon metrics referenced are for educational brochures; no sustainability-linked pricing or ESG ratchet is proposed in this term sheet.
Employment and retention: parties intend to negotiate a generic retention pool and standard non-compete/non-solicit; no individual employee data or compensation terms are included.
Exclusivity and confidentiality mechanics: exclusivity period [TBD]; each party will maintain existing information-barrier policies, use a sample insider-list template for compliance training, and follow standing trading blackout windows (reference guide only).
Commercial terms: long-form SPA to include standard conditions precedent, service level obligations for platform integration, transitional services, and price-adjustment/earn-out mechanisms [TBD].
Disclosure and OJK/IDX process: upon signing, the parties will prepare a draft Keterbukaan Informasi for OJK/BEI review and publish per applicable timelines; until public announcement, external queries are routed to the role mailbox legal.compliance@lintasnusa.co.id.
Governing law and dispute resolution: laws of Indonesia; disputes to be resolved through BANI Arbitration Center, Jakarta, with Indonesian language prevailing.
Identifiers and placeholders: kode saham LNTX and ISIN ID000000LNT0 are placeholders for drafting convenience and shall be replaced or omitted in the definitive agreements; this document does not constitute a public offer of securities.
